hooks.command: node -e "/* Protect secrets, lockfile, and .git internals. Templates like .env.example stay editable. */ const fs=require('fs'); const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(0,'utf8')); const p=(d.tool_input?.file_path||'').replace(/\\\\/g,'/'); const base=p.split('/').pop(); const envOk=['.env.example','.env.sample','.env.template']; const isEnv=/^\.env(\..+)?$/.test(base)&&!envOk.includes(base); const isGit=p.split('/').includes('.git'); const isLock=base==='package-lock.json'; if(isEnv||isGit||isLock){ console.error('Blocked: protected file ('+base+'). Put real secrets in .env (never committed); edit .env.example for the template. Use npm commands for package-lock.json.'); process.exit(2); }"

node -e "/* Block catastrophic commands. A safety net, not a sandbox. */ const fs=require('fs'); const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(0,'utf8')); const c=d.tool_input?.command||''; const bad=[/rm\s+-[a-zA-Z]*[rf][a-zA-Z]*\s+(\/\*?|~\/?\*?|\.\.?|\*)(?=\s|$)/,/git\s+clean\s+-[a-zA-Z]*f/i,/\bdel\s+\/[a-zA-Z]*[sq]/i,/Remove-Item\s+[^\n]*-Recurse/i,/\bDROP\s+(DATABASE|TABLE)\b/i,/\bTRUNCATE\s+\w/i]; if(bad.some(re=>re.test(c))){ console.error('Blocked: potentially destructive command. If you really need this, run it yourself in a terminal.'); process.exit(2); }"

node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(0,'utf8')); const p=d.tool_input?.file_path||''; if(/\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$/.test(p) && fs.existsSync('node_modules/.bin/prettier')) { require('child_process').execSync('npx prettier --write \"'+p+'\"', {stdio:'inherit'}); }"

node -e "console.log('\n--- Session Summary ---'); const {execSync}=require('child_process'); try { const status=execSync('git status --porcelain',{encoding:'utf8'}); if(status.trim()) { console.log('Modified files:'); console.log(status); console.log('Remember: Review changes before committing!'); } else { console.log('No uncommitted changes.'); } } catch(e) { console.log('Not a git repository or git not available.'); }"

node -e "/* Static message text, so no shell-quoting surprises. */ const {exec}=require('child_process'); if(process.platform==='win32'){ exec('powershell -Command \"Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; [System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox]::Show(\'Claude Code needs your attention\',\'Claude Code\')\"'); } else if(process.platform==='darwin'){ exec('osascript -e \'display notification \"Claude Code needs your attention\" with title \"Claude Code\"\''); } else { exec('notify-send \"Claude Code\" \"Claude Code needs your attention\"'); }"
